nodes.name: Flat-billed kingfisher
nodes.summary: Flat-billed kingfisher（Flat-billed kingfisher，学名 Todiramphus recurvirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于岸、森林，常见栖息地包括滩涂。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 岸
nodes.summary: 岸是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括红胸秋沙鸭、White-browed coucal、Burchell's coucal等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Flat-billed kingfishers are found on the islands of Upolu and Savai'i in lowland and coastal areas. They were found not found in upland forests above 1,200m, most likely because food items become increasingly scarce with increased elevation

links.evidence: Flat-billed kingfishers are found on the islands of Upolu and Savai'i in lowland and coastal areas. They were found not found in upland forests above 1,200m, most likely because food items become increasingly scarce with increased elevation
